# Nashville Fence Guide

> Nashville Fence Guide is an independent directory and resource platform for fence installation in the Nashville, TN metro area. We connect homeowners with vetted local fence contractors and publish plain-English guides on cost, permits, materials, repair, and adjacent outdoor-living services. Coverage spans Davidson, Williamson, Sumner, Wilson, Rutherford, Maury, Montgomery counties.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://nashvillefenceguide.com/): Overview of Nashville fence installation — costs, repair, vetted local contractors, free quotes.
- [Find a Pro](https://nashvillefenceguide.com/contractors): Directory of vetted Nashville fence installers, gate companies, land surveyors, site prep crews, staining specialists, and outdoor design firms. Filter by area, service category, and project type.
- [Service Areas](https://nashvillefenceguide.com/service-areas): Local pricing, popular styles, and HOA notes for every Nashville-area city and neighborhood we cover.
- [Fence Types](https://nashvillefenceguide.com/fence-types): Compare wood privacy, vinyl, aluminum, chain link, horizontal cedar, farm and ranch, wrought iron, pet, and pool safety fencing.
- [Cost Guide](https://nashvillefenceguide.com/cost-guide): Real installed prices for fence installation in Nashville by material and project size.
- [Permits and Rules](https://nashvillefenceguide.com/permits): Metro Nashville Codes fence permit requirements, height limits, dig-safe 811 protocol, and pool fence code.
- [Fence Repair](https://nashvillefenceguide.com/repair): Nashville fence repair pricing by material and the 60-percent repair-versus-replace rule.
- [Commercial Fencing](https://nashvillefenceguide.com/commercial-fencing): Security fence and access control for Nashville businesses, multifamily, and industrial sites.
- [Pool Fence Code](https://nashvillefenceguide.com/pool-fence-code): 2018 ISPSC pool barrier requirements as enforced in Metro Nashville Codes.
- [Historic Overlay Fence Rules](https://nashvillefenceguide.com/historic-overlays): Nashville historic overlay district fence approval — submission steps, approved materials.
- [Resource Center](https://nashvillefenceguide.com/resources): In-depth guides for Middle Tennessee homeowners.
- [Get Free Fence Quotes](https://nashvillefenceguide.com/get-quotes): Submit project details to receive up to three quotes from vetted Nashville fence pros.
- [Submit Your Business](https://nashvillefenceguide.com/submit-listing): Free listing for verified Tennessee fence, gate, surveying, and outdoor-living contractors.
- [Advertise](https://nashvillefenceguide.com/advertise): Premium directory placement, category sponsorship, and homepage features for Nashville fence contractors.
- [About](https://nashvillefenceguide.com/about): Mission, methodology, and disclosure.

## Fence type pages

- [Wood Privacy Fence Installation Nashville](https://nashvillefenceguide.com/fence-types/wood-privacy): Cedar privacy fencing — materials, installed cost per linear foot, lifespan in Middle Tennessee.
- [Premium Vinyl Fence Installation Nashville](https://nashvillefenceguide.com/fence-types/vinyl): Premium PVC fencing — HOA compatibility, maintenance, cost.
- [Ornamental Aluminum Fence Installation Nashville](https://nashvillefenceguide.com/fence-types/aluminum): Ornamental metal fencing for pools and front yards.
- [Galvanized Chain Link Fence Installation Nashville](https://nashvillefenceguide.com/fence-types/chain-link): Galvanized and vinyl-coated chain link — residential and commercial use.
- [Modern Horizontal Privacy Fence Installation Nashville](https://nashvillefenceguide.com/fence-types/horizontal-privacy): Modern slat-style cedar fencing popular in design-forward Nashville neighborhoods.
- [Farm & Ranch Fence Installation Nashville](https://nashvillefenceguide.com/fence-types/farm-ranch): Four-board and woven-wire fencing for acreage across Middle Tennessee.
- [Wrought Iron Fence Installation Nashville](https://nashvillefenceguide.com/fence-types/wrought-iron): Estate-grade welded iron fencing.
- [Invisible & Pet Fence Fence Installation Nashville](https://nashvillefenceguide.com/fence-types/pet-fence): Containment solutions for Nashville dog owners.
- [Pool Safety Fence Fence Installation Nashville](https://nashvillefenceguide.com/fence-types/pool-safety): ISPSC-compliant pool barriers.

## Service area pages

- [Belle Meade Fence Installation](https://nashvillefenceguide.com/service-areas/belle-meade): Ornamental Aluminum & Iron, typical project $8,400 – $14,200.
- [Green Hills Fence Installation](https://nashvillefenceguide.com/service-areas/green-hills): Wood Privacy & Aluminum, typical project $5,800 – $9,800.
- [East Nashville Fence Installation](https://nashvillefenceguide.com/service-areas/east-nashville): Horizontal Modern Cedar, typical project $4,200 – $7,800.
- [Germantown Fence Installation](https://nashvillefenceguide.com/service-areas/germantown): Iron & Vinyl Privacy, typical project $4,600 – $8,400.
- [Brentwood Fence Installation](https://nashvillefenceguide.com/service-areas/brentwood): Aluminum & Wood Privacy, typical project $6,400 – $11,800.
- [Franklin Fence Installation](https://nashvillefenceguide.com/service-areas/franklin): Four-Board & Aluminum, typical project $5,200 – $12,000.
- [12 South Fence Installation](https://nashvillefenceguide.com/service-areas/twelve-south): Horizontal Cedar & Iron, typical project $4,400 – $7,600.
- [Sylvan Park Fence Installation](https://nashvillefenceguide.com/service-areas/sylvan-park): Wood Privacy & Modern Horizontal, typical project $4,000 – $7,200.
- [Hendersonville Fence Installation](https://nashvillefenceguide.com/service-areas/hendersonville): Vinyl Privacy & Aluminum, typical project $4,800 – $8,800.
- [Mount Juliet Fence Installation](https://nashvillefenceguide.com/service-areas/mount-juliet): Wood Privacy & Chain Link, typical project $3,800 – $7,200.
- [Hermitage Fence Installation](https://nashvillefenceguide.com/service-areas/hermitage): Wood Privacy & Chain Link, typical project $3,400 – $6,400.
- [Forest Hills Fence Installation](https://nashvillefenceguide.com/service-areas/forest-hills): Aluminum & Cedar Privacy, typical project $7,800 – $13,400.
- [Nashville Fence Installation](https://nashvillefenceguide.com/service-areas/nashville): Mixed, All Materials, typical project $3,800 – $9,800.
- [Murfreesboro Fence Installation](https://nashvillefenceguide.com/service-areas/murfreesboro): Vinyl Privacy & Aluminum, typical project $4,200 – $8,400.
- [Spring Hill Fence Installation](https://nashvillefenceguide.com/service-areas/spring-hill): Vinyl & Aluminum, typical project $4,400 – $8,800.
- [Gallatin Fence Installation](https://nashvillefenceguide.com/service-areas/gallatin): Aluminum & Wood Privacy, typical project $4,400 – $9,200.
- [Smyrna Fence Installation](https://nashvillefenceguide.com/service-areas/smyrna): Wood Privacy & Chain Link, typical project $3,400 – $6,800.
- [Lebanon Fence Installation](https://nashvillefenceguide.com/service-areas/lebanon): Four-Board & Wood Privacy, typical project $3,800 – $8,400.
- [Nolensville Fence Installation](https://nashvillefenceguide.com/service-areas/nolensville): Aluminum & Vinyl, typical project $5,200 – $10,800.
- [Columbia Fence Installation](https://nashvillefenceguide.com/service-areas/columbia): Four-Board & Wood Privacy, typical project $3,600 – $7,800.
- [Clarksville Fence Installation](https://nashvillefenceguide.com/service-areas/clarksville): Chain Link & Wood Privacy, typical project $3,200 – $6,400.

## Resource articles

- [Wood vs. Vinyl: Which Fence Wins in Nashville?](https://nashvillefenceguide.com/resources/wood-vs-vinyl-nashville): How Middle Tennessee humidity, freeze-thaw cycles, and HOA rules tip the scale between cedar privacy and premium vinyl.
- [The Best Fences for Dogs in Nashville Yards](https://nashvillefenceguide.com/resources/best-fences-for-dogs): Climb-proof heights, dig guards, and material picks that keep golden retrievers in and coyotes out across Davidson County.
- [Pool Fence Safety Laws in Tennessee](https://nashvillefenceguide.com/resources/pool-fence-safety-tn): A homeowner-friendly walkthrough of the 2018 ISPSC barrier code, self-closing gates, and 4 ft minimum requirements.
- [Metro Nashville Fence Permit Guide](https://nashvillefenceguide.com/resources/metro-nashville-permits): When you do (and do not) need a permit, height limits by yard, and how to handle historic overlay districts.
- [Anatomy of a Nashville Fence Quote](https://nashvillefenceguide.com/resources/fence-cost-breakdown): Line-item analysis: materials, labor, post-setting, gates, and the hidden costs that surprise first-time buyers.
- [Why Horizontal Cedar Took Over East Nashville](https://nashvillefenceguide.com/resources/horizontal-cedar-trend): The design history behind the slat-style fence dominating East Nashville, 12 South, and Sylvan Park bungalows.
- [When to Repair vs. Replace Your Nashville Fence (The 60% Rule)](https://nashvillefenceguide.com/resources/fence-repair-vs-replace-nashville): A simple cost-based rule for deciding whether to repair or replace a damaged Nashville fence, plus material-by-material repair cost ranges from Davidson and Williamson Counties.
- [Storm-Damaged Fence in Nashville: Insurance Claim + Same-Week Repair](https://nashvillefenceguide.com/resources/storm-damaged-fence-nashville-insurance): Step-by-step Nashville guide to documenting storm fence damage, filing your Tennessee homeowner's insurance claim, and getting same-week fence repair from a vetted local contractor.
- [7 Questions to Ask Before Hiring a Nashville Fence Installer](https://nashvillefenceguide.com/resources/hire-nashville-fence-installer-questions): Nashville-specific vetting checklist for fence contractors, Tennessee licensing, 811 dig-safe, post depth, HOA approvals, payment terms, and the three recent installs every reputable Nashville crew should be able to show you.
- [Property Line Surveys Before Your Nashville Fence Install](https://nashvillefenceguide.com/resources/property-line-survey-nashville-fence): When you actually need a property line survey before installing a fence in Nashville, what it costs in Davidson and Williamson Counties, and the Tennessee adverse-possession risk if you skip it.
- [How Much Does a Driveway Gate Cost in Nashville?](https://nashvillefenceguide.com/resources/driveway-gate-cost-nashville): Real installed price ranges for driveway gates in Nashville, from a basic $2,000 single swing to a $40,000 estate gate, plus the line items most contractors leave off the first quote.
- [Best Gate Companies in Nashville](https://nashvillefenceguide.com/resources/best-gate-installation-companies-nashville): Three ranked picks for driveway gate installation in the Nashville metro, Madison Steel & Iron Works of TN (Davidson), American Fence and Gate (Williamson), and Master Fence (Rutherford). Plus how to vet any gate contractor before signing.
